TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-13-2005 IN DEPT. 514, MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED, PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER. DEFENDANT FILED TWO MOTIONS THROUGH ITS SEPARATE COUNSEL, ANDREW M. ZACKS AND CURTIS DOWLING (LAW FIRM OF ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER) AND STEVEN TAXMAN (LAW FIRM OF WASSERMAN-TAXMAN). HARRISON NAM APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. THE COURT HEARS ORAL ARGUMENT. THE COURT GRANTS BOTH MOTIONS AND AWARDS A SINGLE AMOUNT OF ATTORNEY FEES FOR DEFENDANT IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $55,000.00, WITHOUT ALLOCATION TO WHICH FIRM UNLESS PREVAILING PARTY PROVIDES SUCH IN THE ORDER. THE STATUTORY COSTS AWARDED SHALL NOT BE DUPLICATED. JUDGE THOMAS J. MELLON, JR., CLERK: V. MACK, REPORTER: K. FARNSWORTH CSR 5162
